steps.title: Use the duration note
steps.content: The task is to indicate how long Elliot Vance's musical piece will last. The relevant note states that the performance will last 639 years.

steps.title: Reject missing-duration choices
steps.content: Choice A names the composer, Choice B gives the location, and Choice D mentions the organ and composer, but none states the duration. The sentence beginning with the 639-year duration directly fulfills the goal. The answer is C.
